calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar sent forthwith from Department 501 for a Short Cause Trial against Defendant Coleman Tyler Jones aka Coleman Jones.

Dept: 505; Visiting Judge: Lydia M. Villareal; Clerk: M. Goodman; Bailiff: Deputy Pliego; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:54:22 a.m. and concluding at 10:00:57 a.m.(D505)

Julia Adams, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Plaintiff 100 Van Ness Associates, LLP.
Coleman Tyler Jones aka Coleman Jones not appearing.
Jonathan Duong, sworn to testify on behalf of 100 Van Ness Associates, LLP.

Notice of time and place of trial filed and served to Defendant on 2/1/24.

Counsel summarizes the facts of the case and the causes of action.
Witness confirms that all documents are true and correct.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibit/s for the Court to review:
Exhibit 1: Lease Agreement
Exhibit 2: Notice to Pay or Quit for June and July 2023.
Exhibit 3: Notice to Pay or Quit for September and October 2023

Based on the testimony and exhibits submitted, the Plaintiff has proven their prima facie case.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff. Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant the following:

Possession of the Premises located at 100 Van Ness Avenue, #1804, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The lease is forfeited.

Past due rent: $21,277
Holdover Damages $17,196
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $741
Other $0

Total Judgment $39,214

The Court signs the judgment.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the exhibits.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Feb-26-2024 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-22-2024 Off Calendar
